scripts.start: vite build && GDK_BACKEND=x11 WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 MDREADR_DEVTOOLS=1 electrobun dev
scripts.dev: vite build && GDK_BACKEND=x11 WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 MDREADR_DEVTOOLS=1 electrobun dev --watch
scripts.build: bun run theme:build && vite build && electrobun build --env=stable
scripts.install:linux:
rm -rf /tmp/mdreadr-install && mkdir -p /tmp/mdreadr-install && tar -xzf artifacts/stable-linux-x64-mdreadr-Setup.tar.gz -C /tmp/mdreadr-install && /tmp/mdreadr-install/installer && sed -i 's|Exec="|Exec=env GDK_BACKEND=x11 WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 "|g' ~/.local/share/applications/mdreadr.desktop && mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && printf '#!/bin/sh
export GDK_BACKEND=x11
export WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1
exec "'"$HOME"'/.local/share/dev.mdreadr.app/stable/app/bin/launcher" "$@"
' > ~/.local/bin/mdreadr && chmod +x ~/.local/bin/mdreadr
scripts.theme:build: npm run astryx -- theme build src/webview/app/theme/mdreadrTheme.ts --out src/webview/app/theme/mdreadr.css && biome format --write src/webview/app/theme
scripts.check: biome ci --error-on-warnings . && bun run typecheck && bun test
